name: RightSignature (Citrix) eSignature API
what_it_does: Electronic signature platform with REST API — enabling businesses to send documents for electronic signature, manage templates, track signing status, and collect signed documents programmatically, with ESIGN/UETA legal compliance, OAuth2 authentication, and integration into business workflows via webhooks.
use_cases: Sending documents for e-signature via RightSignature API for automated contract workflows
Managing document templates via RightSignature API for standardized agreement distribution
Tracking signing status via RightSignature API for contract lifecycle management
Integrating e-signature via RightSignature API into ShareFile (Citrix) document workflows
Collecting signed contracts via RightSignature webhooks for automated processing
not_for: Enterprise CLM with complex approval workflows (use DocuSign CLM or Adobe Acrobat Sign for enterprise)
Global operations requiring EU-specific eIDAS compliance (verify RightSignature's current compliance)
Teams not using Citrix/ShareFile ecosystem (integration value is highest within Citrix)
best_when: A business already using Citrix ShareFile for document management needs integrated e-signature capabilities without switching platforms.
avoid_when: You need advanced CLM features, global compliance (eIDAS), or are not in the Citrix ecosystem.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access. API token for server-side access (from account settings). Authorization: Bearer header. Webhook callbacks for document status events (signed, declined, expired). ESIGN/UETA compliant. Audit trail for signed documents. Citrix account required for management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Personal $12/month (5 docs); Business $60/month (unlimited); Business Premium $100/month; Teams pricing available
pricing.notes: Founded 2009 (RightSignature). Acquired by Citrix Systems 2014. Now part of Citrix (Cloud Software Group after private equity acquisition 2022). ShareFile integration: native e-signature within ShareFile platform. ESIGN/UETA compliant (US). Electronic records stored securely. Audit trail for each document. Bulk sending. Template management. Signer redirect on completion. API used for custom integration. Documentation available at rightsignature.com/apidocs. Citrix/Cloud Software Group strategic direction may affect product roadmap.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 or API token. Webhooks. ESIGN/UETA. Citrix-owned. No free tier. ShareFile integration value. Cloud Software Group PE ownership uncertainty. US data residency.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Document reads idempotent by document ID. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers (may retry). Document send not idempotent — check status before resending.
known_agent_gotchas: Citrix/Cloud Software Group ownership: strategic direction uncertain post-PE acquisition 2022
Primary value is ShareFile integration — standalone use less compelling vs DocuSign
Document URLs expire — download signed PDFs promptly after signing completion
Webhook events for document lifecycle: sent, viewed, signed, declined, expired
ESIGN/UETA compliant (US) but verify eIDAS status for EU use cases
API documentation at rightsignature.com/apidocs (not standard developer portal location)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 or API token. ESIGN/UETA legally compliant. SOC2 certified. Audit trail for all signed documents. Signed documents are legally binding records (high sensitivity). US data residency. Citrix/Cloud Software Group PE ownership (potential security policy changes). Webhook delivery for document events.
